title: chrysoglossum chloranthum
intro: Chrysoglossum chloranthum, also known as the Green Oar or Green Tongue Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysoglossum chloranthum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and then used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
